storyInfo: In the Sky Mirror Pavilion, Mo Yi claims that the Grand Commandant's goal is to steal the writing knife and alter history, unlocking Bu Fan with Wei Yenwu's life, and that he is aided and abetted by Chun, head of the Sui Regulator. With leaves rustling and candlelight flickering, Baizao sits on the brink of war.

attributes.content: Your uniform suits you.
attributes.name: Sui Regulator Supervisor

attributes.content: S-Supervisor! Zuo Le reporting.
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: At ease. No need to be too uptight your first day on the job. Better that you maintain your youthful energy.
attributes.name: Sui Regulator Supervisor

attributes.content: Understood, Supervisor!
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: Do you know where we are, Zuo Le?
attributes.name: Sui Regulator Supervisor

attributes.content: 'Upon the peaks was the beast cornered and killed.' This was the battlefield where we killed a Feranmut during the Great Hunt.
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: But...
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: Zuo Le pauses, unsure if he can continue, until he sees the patient gaze of the Supervisor.
This was also where countless soldiers and civilians lost their lives... where living, breathing people faded into a graveyard of lines of cold numbers between the pages.
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: You have realized something that many Candleholders older than you do not.
attributes.name: Sui Regulator Supervisor

attributes.content: 'Carry the fire that drives out the shadows of the Feranmut, and travel amongst the people to learn their troubles.'
attributes.name: Sui Regulator Supervisor

attributes.content: It was the first Candleholder, holding the torch that discovered the existence of the Feranmuts, that made possible the war with the gods which secured Yan's future.
attributes.name: Sui Regulator Supervisor

attributes.content: Even today, the existence of Feranmuts is only known to a select few.
attributes.name: Sui Regulator Supervisor

attributes.content: Which makes it all the more important that the Candleholder's fire remains brightly lit where shadows fall.
attributes.name: Sui Regulator Supervisor

attributes.content: I will do my utmost to protect the people.
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: I am glad to see your resolve. But let me ask you again—what are the Feranmuts, in your eyes?
attributes.name: Sui Regulator Supervisor

attributes.content: What are the proxies who live amongst us within the season, on whom we keep a constant watch?
attributes.name: Sui Regulator Supervisor

attributes.content: The hearts of people are fickle; the hearts of beasts even more so. Perhaps some amongst Them have once aided Yan, be it out of a whim, or true sincerity.
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: But weighing the pros and cons, ultimately... They are different from us. They are... enemies.
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: Enemies, you say...
attributes.name: Sui Regulator Supervisor

attributes.content: ...Enemies.
attributes.name: Sui Regulator Supervisor

attributes.content: <p=2>One day before the day of the full moon, Hour of Yu</>
attributes.name: group_location_stamp

attributes.content: Supervisor...
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: What are you doing here?
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: That question should be mine to ask.
attributes.name: Chun

attributes.content: Where have you taken the token from the Garden of Grotesqueries after the Placation was completed?
attributes.name: Chun

attributes.content: Something was not right at the Sui Regulator, and scriptgeists were running amok in the Sky Mirror Pavilion. I wanted to wait for the situation to settle down before seeking your counsel...
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: Then you can give it to me here.
attributes.name: Chun

attributes.content: I have heard that it was not the usual jade rule that was retrieved from the Garden of Grotesqueries this year. I will bring it back to the Sui Regulator for further investigation.
attributes.name: Chun

attributes.content: Acting on a subconscious instinct, Zuo Le finds himself taking a step back from his familiar superior.
My, my. I did not think there would come a day when Candleholder Zuo defied his orders.
attributes.name: Chun

attributes.content: Cut the crap—you're Chun, head of the Sui Regulator?
attributes.name: Mo Yi

attributes.content: A Shanhaizhong member, in the Sky Mirror Pavilion. A highly ranked one, too, judging from your attire. Under normal circumstances, the Patrol Battalion would have faced severe penalties.
attributes.name: Chun

attributes.content: And this is... Lady Ch'en?
attributes.name: Chun

attributes.content: You're Zuo Le's boss?
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: Though I am unworthy of this position, it is my duty.
attributes.name: Chun

attributes.content: What are you doing here? Waiting for us to walk into a trap?
attributes.name: Mo Yi

attributes.content: Unfortunately, it is not you that I am waiting for.
attributes.name: Chun

attributes.content: Hand over the token, Zuo Le, and you may leave with your friends. We can discuss your association with undesirable elements later.
attributes.name: Chun

attributes.content: I thought you would tell him to take me in on the spot to make up for his transgressions.
attributes.name: Mo Yi

attributes.content: We are in the courts of Yan, not some bandit camp.
attributes.name: Chun

attributes.content: Fine enough for you to say.
attributes.name: Mo Yi

attributes.content: Who was it who encouraged Jie to enter the Tomb of Sui, so that the more dangerous proxy for Yan would die in Wang's place, catapulting her own career in the process?
attributes.name: Mo Yi

attributes.content: Yaan would be ashamed to have a descendant like you!
attributes.name: Mo Yi

attributes.content: Mo Yi! The Supervisor is not like that!
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: Really? Then why did she become the Supervisor so soon after Jie's death?
attributes.name: Mo Yi

attributes.content: Only a thief sees thieves everywhere.
attributes.name: Chun

attributes.content: Keep your mouth shut, for you are not worthy to speak her name.
attributes.name: Chun

attributes.content: The imperial court of Yan does not pause or waver for any person or thing. All that it does is measured against the interests of Great Yan.
attributes.name: Chun

attributes.content: The interests of Great Yan?
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: It seems Lady Ch'en has something to say.
attributes.name: Chun

attributes.content: Very well. I will give you three minutes, in consideration of the risks that Zuo Le ran to retrieve this object from the Garden of Grotesqueries.
attributes.name: Chun

attributes.content: There is someone I am waiting for anyway. Ask your questions, then leave the token and leave this place.
attributes.name: Chun

attributes.content: Waiting for someone?
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: Yes, waiting for someone.
attributes.name: Chun

attributes.content: Is it the proxy who holds the key?
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: Why do you say that?
attributes.name: Chun

attributes.content: Geists run rampant through Baizao, but Zuo Le is the only one who is trying to tackle the scriptgeists at the source, and on no orders at that.
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: The L.G.D. was never so negligent, even when Wei Yenwu's oversight was at its laxest.
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: The first thing you asked about when you saw Zuo Le was not the scriptgeists, but the token from the Garden of Grotesqueries... you seem to care nothing for your responsibilities.
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: The Sui Regulator is not the police.
attributes.name: Chun

attributes.content: Who in Baizao is more qualified than the Sui Regulator to deal with the scriptgeists?
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: Your goals are aligned with the Grand Commandant's... you want the writing knife.
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: And if Mo Yi is telling the truth, no one in Baizao is closer to the writing knife than Jun.
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: You do the L.G.D. proud, superintendent.
attributes.name: Chun

attributes.content: Why are you assisting the Grand Commandant's plot? What do you plan to do with Wei Yenwu? Or have you already joined forces with him?
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: Plot?
attributes.name: Chun

attributes.content: You may have been an excellent officer of the law, Lady Ch'en, but it is not your place to intervene in matters of national interest.
attributes.name: Chun

attributes.content: I've been to places and seen things. There's no need for grandiose words.
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: If your plot is indeed in the interest of the nation, you should feel no shame in saying it out loud.
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: Only those involved in political squabbles would keep bringing up 'national interest' when questioned, beating around the bush and deflecting the question.
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: You should be careful with your words, Lady Ch'en. The matters of state are complex and interconnected, and it is not unusual for officials to have differing views. Your words insult all who serve the state.
attributes.name: Chun

attributes.content: For a thousand years, the Sui Regulator has had one mission, and one alone—to do what is best for Yan in matters pertaining to Feranmuts. Nothing else matters to us.
attributes.name: Chun

attributes.content: Even if the Grand Commandant's actions are indeed drastic, extraordinary times call for extraordinary measures. The use of the writing knife does not constitute treason.
attributes.name: Chun

attributes.content: Then what is he planning—
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: At this point, I doubt this damned old Elf is gonna talk, so I'll do the talking for her.
attributes.name: Mo Yi

attributes.content: Just as I suspected—the Grand Commandant wants to rewrite history with the writing knife and completely eliminate the bestial Sui. The price is the True Lung's life.
attributes.name: Mo Yi

attributes.content: But why... what does the True Lung's life have to do with destroying a Feranmut?
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: We were just talking about it, before we were interrupted... a thousand years ago, the grandmaster discovered a piece of Originium that he presented to the True Lung as a weapon that can end the Great Hunt.
attributes.name: Mo Yi

attributes.content: Realizing its importance, the True Lung had his Fangshi perform a ritual that linked it to True Lung's bloodline.
attributes.name: Mo Yi

attributes.content: Henceforth, the power of the Originium may only be harnessed by the reigning True Lung.
attributes.name: Mo Yi

attributes.content: That True Lung had a bit of a conscience, at least, and he set a condition in the ritual, probably to prevent his descendants from abusing it—
attributes.name: Mo Yi

attributes.content: The full power of the Originium can only be unleashed by sacrificing the life of the True Lung. Hence it was given the name Bu Fan—'No Rebellion'.
attributes.name: Mo Yi

attributes.content: But does the True Lung's life to be sacrificed really have to be the emperor's? Why did the Grand Commandant go to such painstaking lengths to obtain this writing knife, if his goal was merely a coup?
attributes.name: Mo Yi

attributes.content: You mean... the Grand Commandant wants to use the writing knife to change the record of who the current True Lung is?!
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: 'The Grand Preceptor incited the prince to regicide.'
attributes.name: Mo Yi

attributes.content: What is the truth of what happened that night? Who sent the Yulin Guard away? Who actually entered the emperor's chambers? These things are not specified in the records...
attributes.name: Mo Yi

attributes.content: Therefore, the records of what happened that night can still be rewritten using the writing knife.
attributes.name: Mo Yi

attributes.content: If the history books and Bu Fan recognize Lord Wei as the reigning True Lung, then the life of the True Lung obviously refers to Lord Wei's life.
attributes.name: Mo Yi

attributes.content: I had thought that you were young, and that though you may have strayed from the righteous path, you should be given the chance to right your wrongs.
attributes.name: Chun

attributes.content: Regrettably, it seems I cannot allow you to live.
attributes.name: Chun

attributes.content: Not putting on a show of honesty and uprightness anymore, are we?
attributes.name: Mo Yi

attributes.content: Supervisor!
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: Hand over the token, Zuo Le! Whatever happens after that is none of your concern!
attributes.name: Chun

attributes.content: If what Mo Yi says is true... then I voice my dissent to your methods, Supervisor.
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: I cannot comply.
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: I don't want to damage the Sky Mirror Pavilion... don't make me do this.
attributes.name: Chun

attributes.content: You're talking to the wrong person. I have the token—
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: Ch'en's vision is obstructed by several maple leaves. The lamplight sways slightly.
Ch'en steps back and prepares to engage, only for Mo Yi to step forward and block Chun's attack.
So the Supervisor of the Sui Regulator is not above sneak attacks... like a thief.
attributes.name: Mo Yi

attributes.content: One can be subtle and reserved with words, but action must be decisive and without hesitation. It is as true in weiqi as it is with all things in life.
attributes.name: Chun

attributes.content: Supervisor...
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: I have read about the writing knife in the past. In Jie's hands, it can indeed alter history and greatly influence events.
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: But we are not proxies. Our tampered historical records will never endure for long!
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: An instant is all it takes to activate Bu Fan.
attributes.name: Chun

attributes.content: Besides...
attributes.name: Chun

attributes.content: After this, there will no longer be a disgraced deposed crown prince in Yan, only a pure True Lung whose legitimacy is beyond question—is that right?
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: That is not the Sui Regulator's concern.
attributes.name: Chun

attributes.content: Since her death, Great Yan's history is already in tatters. One more change will hardly make a difference—
attributes.name: Chun

attributes.content: How can you be so sure that we cannot record history truthfully?
attributes.name: Ch'en Chao-ch'ien

attributes.content: Ch'en Chao-ch'ien... Magistrate of Water for the Sky Mirror Pavilion.
attributes.name: Chun

attributes.content: I wanted to ask you as well, Supervisor...
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: For many years, you assisted Jie in compiling history in her office... why is it that you have now turned to tampering with history?
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: The records of Yan are classified into four parts: Classics, History, Philosophy, and Literature.
attributes.name: Chun

attributes.content: The divisions of History and Philosophy may seem distinct, but even the masterwork of the one venerated as the Saint of History was, merely the personal treatise within Philosophy.
attributes.name: Chun

attributes.content: Those who follow, modeling their brushes after his style, produce what is ultimately but the statement of a single house, and the House of Yan.
attributes.name: Chun

attributes.content: Those writings are no more than comments after the fact. The truth has long faded into the cracks of time.
attributes.name: Chun

attributes.content: How could you say that?
attributes.name: Ch'en Chao-ch'ien

attributes.content: You must have read the Saint of History's notes. Despite imprisonment and torture, he always wrote the facts as they were and exposed injustice.
attributes.name: Ch'en Chao-ch'ien

attributes.content: You must have read the history tomes of the Sky Mirror Pavilion, written by thousands of sages who poured their hearts and souls into them, striving to set the record straight, to weigh every word in judgment of right and wrong.
attributes.name: Ch'en Chao-ch'ien

attributes.content: You must have heard of unofficial historians—meticulously investigating and analyzing their sources, coveting not the court's wealth and rank, but striving only to uphold justice for the common people.
attributes.name: Ch'en Chao-ch'ien

attributes.content: I saw with my own eyes the elders of my family dying on white fields of snow because they wanted to write down the truth... nay, because they were honest to themselves!
attributes.name: Ch'en Chao-ch'ien

attributes.content: These people, who wrote history with their own flesh and blood, who willingly became the flame to illuminate the truth even for a moment—
attributes.name: Ch'en Chao-ch'ien

attributes.content: Who are they to you, Supervisor?
attributes.name: Ch'en Chao-ch'ien

attributes.content: They are the writers.
attributes.name: Chun

attributes.content: True and false, right and wrong, these things always depend on the stance of the writer, rather than on what is actually right.
attributes.name: Chun

attributes.content: You ought to know—even with the revisions of countless esteemed scholars, the histories we read are still rife with embellishment, omissions and lies.
attributes.name: Chun

attributes.content: The ironic thing is... we could not even call such things 'evil'.
attributes.name: Chun

attributes.content: The curled leaves make a sharp sound against each other, questioningly, lamentingly.
Stand back, Ch'en Chao-ch'ien. You are neither Candleholder, nor Shanhaizhong, nor the niece of a deposed crown prince. This is not your fight.
attributes.name: Chun

attributes.content: I—
attributes.name: Ch'en Chao-ch'ien

attributes.content: Did the Imperial Historical Cabinet truly take up responsibility for writing history after her passing? Did the Sky Mirror Pavilion truly fulfill its duty of righting the wrongs?
attributes.name: Chun

attributes.content: You are the descendant of historians. If you take up their mantle, can you truly guarantee that every word will be true for all eternity?
attributes.name: Chun

attributes.content: No. You dare not shoulder this responsibility.
attributes.name: Chun

attributes.content: I know about you.
attributes.name: Chun

attributes.content: You wanted to change the Sky Mirror Pavilion's culture of obsession with the analysis of ancient history while neglecting recent history. That's why you took up a minor position at the Sky Mirror Pavilion, hoping to lead by example by studying your family's history.
attributes.name: Chun

attributes.content: Decades, centuries, millennia. How could you claim to speak for history, when you have not borne witness to time on the scale that she knew?
attributes.name: Chun

attributes.content: Stand back.
attributes.name: Chun

attributes.content: The maple leaves sharpen.
This time, no one saw what Chun did. All she did was wave her sleeve; the next instant, Ch'en Chao-ch'ien was lying unconscious on the floor.
Chao-ch'ien?!
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: Supervisor—
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: She's just unconscious. She'll wake up in a couple of hours. There is no need for her to sink any deeper into this mire. She's but an unfortunate ordinary woman. She shouldn't have to be like you... or like me.
attributes.name: Chun

attributes.content: I hear Elves live a long time.
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: We do.
attributes.name: Chun

attributes.content: You don't believe in history or in lasting justice in people's hearts... because the one who had walked side-by-side with you on the long road of time died because of you?
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: This question is not yours to ask, Ch'en Hui-chieh.
attributes.name: Chun

attributes.content: As an Elf, you don't know where you came from, whether there are any of your kind left, or whether there'll ever be a home for you—
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: My past, present and future belong to Yan.
attributes.name: Chun

attributes.content: And that involves tossing your fellows into the abyss?
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: Having her die in Wang's place was the appropriate decision under the circumstances! This is beyond all doubt!
attributes.name: Chun

attributes.content: Compiling history, recording the passage of time... have you any idea of the power of these 'years', the power of time?
attributes.name: Chun

attributes.content: 'The beast walks with the generous earth.' She had gone one step further. Her power was rooted in words, and lived in history. As long as the records of Yan continued, her power would continue to grow without end.
attributes.name: Chun

attributes.content: If left unchecked, what sort of monster would be created in the end? It would be something even more powerful, even more terrible than Sui itself!
attributes.name: Chun

attributes.content: She was my mentor, my confidant, my friend. But I could not endanger Great Yan with my own selfish interests.
attributes.name: Chun

attributes.content: I've seen people like you... people who abandoned their friends, but long to see them again in dreams, in order to beg for forgiveness.
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: Head of the Sui Regulator, what would you do if there was a way to see her again?
attributes.name: Mo Yi

attributes.content: I warn you, do not play games with the lives of millions for the fantasies of a madman!
attributes.name: Chun

attributes.content: Wang did not go into the Tomb of Sui for the sole purpose of eliminating Sui.
attributes.name: Chun

attributes.content: The object that he had you retrieve from the Garden of Grotesqueries surely has something to do with his deranged plans to bring the dead back to life.
attributes.name: Chun

attributes.content: I'm surprised... I thought you got along well with her when you were her Candleholder.
attributes.name: Mo Yi

attributes.content: Isn't there a part of you, somewhere, that wants his plan to succeed?
attributes.name: Mo Yi

attributes.content: He already failed a hundred and twenty years ago. He will fail again. Allowing him to continue on his reckless path will only lead to more disaster.
attributes.name: Chun

attributes.content: How can I trust a madman who treats heaven and earth as his weiqi board, and all lives and souls as his pieces? How can I trust a sinner who caused the death of his sister?
attributes.name: Chun

attributes.content: How can I trust the obsession of a Feranmut?
attributes.name: Chun

attributes.content: Because, like you, he walked this land, lived in the seasons, and vowed to become 'human', to become part of this land and those who live upon it.
attributes.name: Mo Yi

attributes.content: 'Human'?
attributes.name: Chun

attributes.content: Humans are humans because they live and die. This is why they shine, as the candle's fleeting glow.
attributes.name: Chun

attributes.content: She has lived, and she has died. Wang seeks to disturb the slumber of the dead, in defiance of the laws of Heaven.
attributes.name: Chun

attributes.content: Even if his delusions somehow came true, how can you be sure that it is the departed herself who has returned and not a geist, a hollow puppet that only carries her image?
attributes.name: Chun

attributes.content: You just don't want to believe.
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: Things seldom go the way people want them to.
attributes.name: Chun

attributes.content: The outcome may not be exactly what we want. But to be shackled by regret and not even have the courage to take a single step...
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: ...That is nothing but cowardice.
attributes.name: Ch'en

attributes.content: You have a way with words, Ch'en Hui-chieh. But I don't see how you intend to carry out the justice you speak of.
attributes.name: Chun

attributes.content: The token and the key. I am only here for them.
attributes.name: Chun

attributes.content: Continue to play games with words, and I will crush you before dealing with them.
attributes.name: Chun

attributes.content: Let's see who's crushing who.
attributes.name: Mo Yi

attributes.content: What about you, Zuo Le?
attributes.name: Chun

attributes.content: I apologize, but I must cause offense.
attributes.name: Zuo Le

attributes.content: Hah. So be it.
attributes.name: Chun

attributes.content: Those who stay near ink get stained. You have made some good friends, Candleholder Zuo.
attributes.name: Chun

attributes.content: Do your worst.
attributes.name: Chun
